mapper.insert: INSERT INTO drink ( category_code, drink_name, drink_name_en, abv, price, country, description, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted, avg_rating, note_count, like_count ) VALUES ( #{categoryCode}, #{drinkName}, #{drinkNameEn}, #{abv}, #{price}, #{country}, #{description}, NOW(), NOW(), 'N', 0, 0, 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM drink WHERE is_deleted = 'N' ORDER BY drink_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE drink SET category_code = #{categoryCode}, drink_name = #{drinkName}, drink_name_en = #{drinkNameEn}, abv = #{abv}, price = #{price}, country = #{country}, description = #{description}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE drink_id = #{drinkId}
UPDATE drink SET is_deleted = 'Y', deleted_at = NOW() WHERE drink_id = #{drinkId}
